# Daily Report — 2026-06-29

## Task Completed
Added `update_request_item` tool (PATCH sc_req_item/{sys_id}). Supports updating
state, stage, assigned_to, assignment_group, work_notes, and close_notes on a
requested item (RITM record). Accepts RITM number (e.g. RITM0010001) or 32-char
sys_id. Added `_resolve_request_item_sys_id` helper for number→sys_id lookup.
Guards against empty-body calls and 404 errors. Registered in `__init__.py`,
`tool_utils.py`, and TOOL_NAMES list.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1909
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level dependencies have known CVEs (setuptools CVE-2024-6345, urllib3
PYSEC-2026-141/142, wheel CVE-2026-24049). No vulnerabilities in servicenow-mcp
package code itself.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/request_tools.py` — added UpdateRequestItemParams,
  _resolve_request_item_sys_id, update_request_item
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — import + TOOL_NAMES registration
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — import + tool definition entry
- `tests/test_update_request_item.py` — 23 new tests (all passing)
- `.github/DAILY_BACKLOG.md` — item 1 moved to Completed
